title: Monet DB giving wrong value from a table when a value is queried after insertion/ Data Loss
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testtable (dim_id UInt64 DEFAULT generateUUIDv4(), dim_type String NOT NULL, dim_value String NOT NULL, UNIQUE(dim_type, dim_value), PRIMARY KEY (dim_id));
SELECT dim_id, dim_type, dim_value FROM testtable WHERE dim_type='user' AND dim_value='user1';

CREATE TABLE test (roe_id UInt64 DEFAULT generateUUIDv4(), roe_type UInt64 NOT NULL, node_event_id UInt64 NOT NULL, dc_servername String, roe_start_date_withtz String, usr_id UInt64, customgroup_id UInt64, queuename_id UInt64, exitstatus_id UInt64);
INSERT INTO test (roe_type, node_event_id, dc_servername) VALUES (1, 100, 'server1');
key_bug_features: Incorrect value retrieval after data insertion
